title: Little Visitor
description: A mod that adds little alien dudes to your Minecraft world
body:
VORP?
![The Little Visitor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/116bf3259efd0809906a9535c8836a2311e412f9.png)

Little Visitors from millions of light years away have landed all over your minecraft overworld with one mission, to gather the resourses necessary to save their homeworld. Will you help them?

Included in this mod are:
- A new otherworldly passive mob, the Little Visitor
- A new structure that spawns in the overworld, the UFO
- New items and a new material obtainable through trade with the Little Visitors
- A new armor set
- New functional blocks

This is my first ever mod and was created with Mcreator, no Fabric port is planned. The updated 1.21 version is currently only available for NeoForge.
Thank you for downloading and enjoy :D

*This mod requires Geckolib
